name: Goblin Freefall Squad
name_jp: ゴブリン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>降</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>下</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>部</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>隊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Special Summoned from the hand in Attack Position: You can target 1 face-up Effect Monster your opponent controls; change this card to Defense Position, also negate the effects of that monster while this monster is in face-up Defense Position. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned to your opponent's field, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can discard 1 card; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Goblin Freefall Squad" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned from the hand in Attack Position: You can target 1 face-up Effect Monster your opponent controls; change this card to Defense Position, also negate the effects of that monster while this monster is in face-up Defense Position. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned to your opponent's field, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can discard 1 card; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Goblin Freefall Squad" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Special Summoned from the hand in Attack Position: You can target 1 face-up Effect Monster your opponent controls; change this card to Defense Position, also negate the effects of that monster while this monster is in face-up Defense Position. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned to your opponent's field, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can discard 1 card; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Goblin Freefall Squad" once per turn.

action: Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
